positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for positive_refined.tptp
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u33,axiom,
    ~taller_than(X0,peter) | taller_than(X0,michael)).

cnf(u30,axiom,
    ~taller_than(X1,X2) | taller_than(X0,X2) | ~taller_than(X0,X1)).

cnf(u32,axiom,
    ~can_block(michael,windy)).

cnf(u23,axiom,
    peter != windy).

cnf(u25,axiom,
    michael != peter).

cnf(u24,axiom,
    michael != windy).

cnf(u27,axiom,
    man(peter)).

cnf(u26,axiom,
    man(michael)).

cnf(u36,axiom,
    can_block(peter,michael)).

cnf(u29,axiom,
    taller_than(peter,michael)).

cnf(u28,axiom,
    man(windy)).

cnf(u31,axiom,
    ~taller_than(X0,X1) | can_block(X0,X1) | ~man(X1) | ~man(X0)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define in_class(X0,X1) := $false
for all inputs,
    define can_jump_when_shooting(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define great_shooter(X0) := $false
for all inputs,
    define shooter(X0) := $false
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable

negative.stdout:
